signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

Powell stated on March 18 that if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his term in May, he would serve as chair pro-tem per legal precedent, as said during a post-Fed meeting press conference[1][2]. No new announcements, confirmations, or resolutions on a successor have occurred since
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Pistons Bounce Back With Game 2 Win Over Magic for First Home Playoff Win Since 2008 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Pistons Bounce Back With Game 2 Win Over Magic for First Home Playoff Win Since 2008 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Pistons defeated Magic in Game 2, marking their first home playoff victory since 2008 after losing Game 1 (the only notable Round 1 upset); this evens their series but involves neither Raptors nor Cavaliers and is not confirmed as market-moving for queried teams.[3][2]
matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers
NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Pistons vs. Magic

signals.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum Break Out of October Descending Channels Amid US-Iran Peace Talk Optimism | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin and Ethereum Break Out of October Descending Channels Amid US-Iran Peace Talk Optimism | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin has surged to $79,000, breaking its main **October descending channel** and extending above its $75,000 long-term pivot, while Ethereum has broken through major resistance levels to $2,400, approaching two-month highs.[1][2]

signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Trending Markets | NO whale bets or smart money moves reported | LOW confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (priced at 41% for 220-239 range) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (24% for 1120-1159, 22% in related listings).[2][3][4]
